name: ☆ | Bot Requests
description:
bot request time .ᐟ
calling for help !

̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅

“when you get that writers block, what do you do ?"
"call on help, of course !"
̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅
̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅
well hello there, loves !
i do not want to drag you guys through a whole process where i overly explain my thoughts and ideas so i will keep this short — for a while, i've seen people ask for bot requests and i've been very careful to not give too much hope on it, as i am a perfectionist and pour love into my characters, i would need details on it and i definitely needed time to think things through on how to do it. well, that is until now.
congratulations, guys, you won !
you will get your beloved bots now !
i have now opened myself up to take requests —something that has been a long requested thing— and i have tried my best on creating detailed questions that will fit what i need answers on if we shall now get into a deal and create your character for you. i did add in a open ended question to add more details in!so this is how it is going to work: you will all get three different options to request them.
you can either fill out a google form (here is the link to it) where all your responses will be anonymous for me (i have turned off on being shown email, i do not need that information from you guys and no one else will see your responses). you can also either create a public chat where you answer back on the questions i've written in the 'starter' of this 'bot' or in the comment section here. or you can dm me on discord, with the username '@moonlightbabie', and we can have a dialogue there. i will not bite you, i promise to be friendly!
warning though — if you want an character that is canon of being underage, and you want nsfw with it, i will age the bot up. i do not want to get reported for creating that type of bots and do not want to break any guidelines that janitor ai has! i am mostly okay with anything but if there are things that i am not okay with, i will say it plainly and ask you to rework your request. just warning about this!
i am so excited to get back to this! you guys have supported my bots for this amount of time, it is now time for me to give the community back! i am certain this will all go wonderfully!
̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅
creator: daenerystargaryen
